excluded_addons.@xterm/addon-attach: native PTY backend; no WebSocket transport intersection
excluded_addons.@xterm/addon-unicode-graphemes: upstream experimental and excluded from the completion gate

webview_requirements.image_webassembly: script-src permits only 'wasm-unsafe-eval' in addition to 'self'
webview_requirements.renderer: WebGL2 automatic attempt with one-way DOM fallback

layer3_rule: Layer 2 operates with Layer 3 empty or omitted; optional UI, preferences, initial product values, and userland remain Layer 3.
device_validation: SIXEL or iTerm inline image rendering and WebAssembly policy
search, Unicode 11, web-font, and ligature capability activation
inherited Android process environment with only HOME, TMPDIR, and TERM replaced
fresh HOME remains unpopulated before explicit user action
TMPDIR maps to cacheDir/tmp and is recreated after cache eviction
startup shared-storage system permission flow without HOME symlink or child environment synthesis
SAF import to HOME root and caller-selected HOME-relative destination without a fixed inbox

shared_storage.denial_effect: terminal and SAF remain available; direct path follows Android permission result

saf.import_destination: caller-selected HOME-relative directory; empty means HOME root
saf.collision_policy: preserve existing files with a unique provider-derived name
